## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Lovable and GrowthX to discuss progress on templates, guides, and overall project status.](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Templates and guides are nearly ready for publication, pending final approval](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [GrowthX has developed an MVP gallery experience for templates with high-quality designs](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Guides section is being built as a separate content area from the blog, with initial articles ready](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [GrowthX is developing sophisticated backend tools for content creation, research, and site optimization](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)

## Topics

### Template Gallery and Design

  - [GrowthX presented an MVP gallery experience for templates](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Categories and layout structure are in place, with ability to hide empty categories](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [Template designs shown are high quality, surpassing current UGC content](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [GrowthX aims to start with 10-30 templates, gradually expanding to fill category pages](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)

### Guides Section Development

  - [New "Guides" section being created separate from the blog](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Initial UI is similar to blog but will be improved over time](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [5 new articles are ready for Lovable team review](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Content will be published unless Lovable team intervenes within 1-2 days](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)

### Technical Approach and Infrastructure

  - [GrowthX is using a flat URL structure for flexibility (e.g., /templates/\[name\] instead of nested categories)](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Backend tools include:](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
      - [Research planning and evaluation system](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
      - [Fact-checking with confidence scoring](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
      - [Knowledge base for storing content artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
      - [Site crawler for tracking daily changes and correlating with analytics](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [GrowthX is building sophisticated tools for content research and creation](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Includes bibliography generation and fact-checking with confidence scores](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Knowledge base being developed to store and retrieve information semantically](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)

### Product Limitations and Potential Improvements

  - [Current Lovable platform limitations prevent multi-step API interactions for complex app building](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Marcel to provide detailed feedback on platform limitations and potential improvements](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Discussion needed with Lovable product team on addressing these limitations](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to continue refining templates and guides](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Lovable team to review 5 new guide articles (link to be shared in Slack)](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Marcel to provide detailed feedback on Lovable platform limitations](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Aim to publish initial content within a week, pending final approvals](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue developing backend tools and knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [Explore potential for Lovable team to access GrowthX's content creation tools in the future](https://fathom.video/share/VqymdoRE3QNkDsUbAsUFVw8sef9SBsZS?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
